field_values.action_summary: The Watch Dog breaks its distance and charges with extreme speed. The protagonist uses his superior jumping ability to evade the beast, leaping thirty feet up into a window.
field_values.camera_intent: Fast-paced tracking shots (dolly or gimbal); Wide shots for scale of jump; Extreme close-ups of beast and exertion; Slow-motion leap sequences
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH005_SC004

## Production Intent
A high-velocity chase sequence where the protagonist utilizes superhuman agility to escape a predatory threat. The sequence must emphasize the physical scale of the environment and the extreme speed of the beast's charge through kinetic camera movement and slow-motion emphasis on the vertical leap.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (experienced Earthman fighter, superhuman agility)
- the_watch_dog (predatory beast)

## Required Environments
- deserted_martian_cityscape (street)
- building exterior (wall with window at 30ft)

## Continuity Constraints
- Speed of the_watch_dog charge must remain consistent across tracking shots.
- The vertical height of the window must be visually established as 30 feet.
- Direction of movement must maintain a linear path from street to building wall.

## Beat List
- BT001: The calm breaks as the predator lunges.
- BT002: High-speed pursuit and terror.
- BT003: The superhuman evasion (30ft leap).
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
